TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_talakaw, title = talakaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/talakaw} }

S.FORM: (kamu nu hulam:高) talakaw ci ina isu haw? 你媽媽很高嗎?
S.PHON: (kamu nu ħur~ɾam:*) tar~ɾakaw ʦi ina isu ħaw? ******?
S.FORM: (kamu nu hulam:高) talakaw ci ina isu haw? 你媽媽很高嗎?
S.PHON: (kamu nu ħur~ɾam:*) tar~ɾakaw ʦi ina isu ħaw? ******?
